beforeEnrollmentChecklist.title: One course focusing on sexuality, queer and/or trans studies. Refer to department website for list of approved courses. (5 credits) One upper-division course focusing on transnational perspective. Refer to department website for list of approved courses. (5 credits) Electives (30 credits): Minimum 10 credits of courses at the 400-level. Maximum 5 credits combined of GWSS 497 and GWSS 499. Maximum 10 credits graded as credit/no credit (5 credits at the 400-level). Refer to department website for list of approved courses.
